title: Detection of harmful organisms in various plants exported to Uzbekistan
bodyHtml:
A temporary ban on import has been imposed by the Uzbek authorities on various fruits/seeds/seedslings/ornamental plants exported to Uzbekistan from Türkiye due to the detection of harmful organisms such as Plum pox virus, Aonidiella aurantii Maskell, Tomato spotted wilt virus (TSWV), Prunus necrotic ringspot virus (PNRSV), Erwinia amylovora, Cuscuta spp.

Until the temporary ban imposed by Uzbek authorities is lifted, all Provincial Directorates of Agriculture and Forestry have been instructed by the Trade Ministry not to issue Phytosanitary Certificates (BSS) for plant and plant-based products for export requests of these companies.

Click here for the announcement regarding the issue.
